sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_dates (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-03-15 10:00:00');
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = last_day(event_time) WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, last_day(event_time) AS last_day_of_month FROM test_dates;
